definition: A special class of lexical entities. The class skosxl:Label is disjoint with each of the classes skos:Concept, skos:ConceptScheme, and skos:Collection.
notes: An instance of skosxl:Label has exactly one skosxl:literalForm. Use when you need to attach metadata (source, date, morphology) directly to a label, or when creating label-to-label relationships.

definition: The property skosxl:prefLabel is used to associate an skosxl:Label instance with a resource.
notes: Range: skosxl:Label. Replaces/extends skos:prefLabel. The integrity condition from SKOS prefLabel still applies (one per language per concept scheme).

definition: The property skosxl:altLabel is used to associate an skosxl:Label instance with a resource as an alternative label.
The property skosxl:hiddenLabel is used to associate an skosxl:Label instance with a resource as a hidden label.
The property skosxl:literalForm is used to give the literal form of an skosxl:Label.
notes: Domain: skosxl:Label. Each skosxl:Label instance must have exactly one skosxl:literalForm. The literal value carries the language tag.

definition: The property skosxl:labelRelation is used for representing binary relations between instances of the class skosxl:Label.
notes: Symmetric. Useful for derivation links: e.g., a scientific name label related to a vernacular name label.
